multi_dialect_dax_sql_mapping.description: Cross-engine DAX-to-SQL translation for unified financial services super-bundle
multi_dialect_dax_sql_mapping.purpose: Enable consistent metric calculations across SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, Snowflake, and Iceberg

DIVIDE.sqlserver: CASE WHEN denominator <> 0 THEN numerator / denominator ELSE NULL END
DIVIDE.oracle: CASE WHEN denominator <> 0 THEN numerator / denominator ELSE NULL END
DIVIDE.postgres: CASE WHEN denominator <> 0 THEN numerator::DECIMAL / denominator::DECIMAL ELSE NULL END

TOTALYTD.sqlserver: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
TOTALYTD.oracle: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
TOTALYTD.postgres: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
TOTALYTD.snowflake: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)
TOTALYTD.iceberg: SUM(expression) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)

sqlserver.materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW view_name WITH (DISTRIBUTION = HASH(entity_id), CLUSTERED INDEX (entity_id, as_of_date)) AS SELECT ...
sqlserver.indexing: CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX idx_name ON table_name; CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX idx_entity_date ON table_name(entity_id, as_of_date);
sqlserver.partitioning: CREATE PARTITION FUNCTION pf_date(datetime) AS RANGE RIGHT FOR VALUES (...); CREATE PARTITION SCHEME ps_date AS PARTITION pf_date TO (...);

oracle.materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW view_name BUILD IMMEDIATE REFRESH FAST ON COMMIT AS SELECT ...;
oracle.indexing: CREATE INDEX idx_entity_date ON table_name(entity_id, as_of_date) LOCAL;
oracle.partitioning: CREATE TABLE table_name (...) PARTITION BY RANGE (as_of_date) (PARTITION p2024 VALUES LESS THAN (TO_DATE('2025-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')), ...);

postgres.materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW view_name AS SELECT ... WITH DATA;
postgres.indexing: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_entity_date ON table_name(entity_id, as_of_date);
postgres.partitioning: CREATE TABLE table_name (...) PARTITION BY RANGE (as_of_date); CREATE TABLE table_name_y2024 PARTITION OF table_name FOR VALUES FROM ('2024-01-01') TO ('2025-01-01');

snowflake.materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW view_name AS SELECT ...;
snowflake.indexing: ALTER TABLE table_name ADD CLUSTERING KEY (entity_id, as_of_date);
snowflake.partitioning: CREATE TABLE table_name (...) CLUSTER BY (entity_id, as_of_date);

iceberg.materialized_view: CREATE TABLE view_name USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (year(as_of_date)) AS SELECT ...;
iceberg.indexing: ALTER TABLE table_name ADD PARTITION FIELD year(as_of_date);
iceberg.partitioning: CREATE TABLE table_name (...) USING iceberg PARTITIONED BY (entity_id, year(as_of_date));
